CustomField.description: Visual color indicator (emoji) for task status. Formula field that displays colored circles based on Status field value.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This formula field displays colored emoji indicators: ⚪ Backlog, 🟡 Pending, 🟠 In Progress, 🔵 In Review, 🔴 Blocked, 🟢 Completed/Closed, ⚫ Removed. Used for quick visual identification in list views and highlight panels.
CustomField.label: Status Color Indicator
